name: College Detectives
overview: College Detective revolves around three curious minds who form a detective agency in their college while dealing with their daily hustles and challenges. They solve complex mysteries on the entire college campus with their own trademark. Avdesh, Tushar, Mohit & Janvi solve exceptionally engaging and weirdly comic cases on campus. However, sooner or later the cases get real and darker.

trailers.title: College Detectives | Official Trailer | WATCH FREE on 8th March only on Amazon miniTV
